remarks: ENDORSEMENT SCHEDULE: 1. WC 00 03 01A - Alternate Employer Endorsement; 2. WC 00 03 13 - Waiver of Our Right to Recover From Others Endorsement; 3. IL 09 85 01 15 - Disclosure Pursuant to Terrorism Risk Insurance Act; 4. CG 21 47 12 07 - Employment Related Practices Exclusion. ADDITIONAL INSURED: Dusk Realty Management Inc. is included as Additional Insured per written contract, agreement, or permit as respects General Liability. SPECIAL CONDITIONS: Waiver of Subrogation applies in favor of the certificate holder as required by written contract. LOCATION DESCRIPTIONS: LOC-001: The Driskill Austin - 604 Brazos Street, Austin, TX 78701 (Occupancy: Hotel); LOC-002: Riverwalk Suites San Antonio - 112 College Street, San Antonio, TX 78205 (Occupancy: Hotel); LOC-003: Fredericksburg Inn & Spa - 245 East Main Street, Fredericksburg, TX 78624 (Occupancy: Hotel); LOC-004: South Congress Motor Hotel - 1220 South Congress Avenue, Austin, TX 78704 (Occupancy: Hotel). NATURE OF OPERATIONS: The insured's principal operations consist of boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas. Entity type: LLC.
